### What the new `entailed_by_span` does (was: digit-presence + 25% bag-of-words)
Three deterministic gates that fire only on a genuine *conflict* (so a true finding is never wrongly rejected), plus a fail-closed semantic judge for the residue:
- **(A) NUMBERS + UNITS** ‚Äî every quantity in the clause (digits, **single digits**, **spelled numbers**, and numbers equal to `work.year`) must stand alone in the span **with the same canonical unit**. The single-digit exemption (old `:449`) and the unconditional year exemption are removed. `points ‚âÝ percent ‚âÝ pp ‚âÝ bps`. Substring-safe (`0.2` is not found inside `10.25`).
- **(B) DIRECTION / POLARITY** ‚Äî a clause exclusively one direction (rose/increased/more‚Ä¶) over a span exclusively the opposite (fell/declined/less‚Ä¶) is rejected. This is burn #1.
- **(C) CONTENT FLOOR** ‚Äî the clause's content words must be present in the span (necessary support; kept as the overlap floor, no longer sufficient on its own).
- **(D) SEMANTIC RESIDUE** ‚Äî modality/hedging (`may reduce` vs `reduces`), negation (`did not reduce` vs `reduces`), and comparator/scope claims route to a constrained judge returning `MATCH | NO_MATCH | UNCERTAIN`. **`UNCERTAIN` and `NO_MATCH` both FAIL CLOSED.** The judge is injectable (`set_entailment_judge`); the default consults the model only when `PG_ENTAILMENT_JUDGE=1` and otherwise returns `UNCERTAIN` (fail closed) ‚Äî so a numberless doctrinal clause is neither auto-passed nor auto-failed: it passes on the content floor when it is a faithful restatement and is routed to the judge when it is not. Signature unchanged (`text, span, work, min_overlap`) ‚Äî no `claim` param, as `test_gate_is_wired` asserts.

What each fix does:

- **CONNECTIVE (T5):** `CONNECTIVES` is split into `NEUTRAL_CONNECTIVES=('while','and')` and `CONTRASTIVE_CONNECTIVES=('whereas','by contrast','but','yet','though')`. The composer now only offers neutral joiners and collapses anything else to `while`.

## SOL LADDER RUNG 3a ‚Äî COMPLETE: the OWNED-frame and HEADING lanes are closed

### What changed in report_ast.py
- **OWNED, premise-free (was report_ast.py:611, the "return []" frame lane):** a frame is now refused if it carries a particular the shared checks miss ‚Äî a spelled quantity (`SPELLED_QTY`, reused from `synthesis_contract`: `doubled`, `a third`, `the vast majority`‚Ä¶), a magnitude/severity absolute (`_MAGNITUDE_ABS`: `fatal`, `lethal`, `deadly`‚Ä¶), or a **novel multi-word named entity** (`_novel_multiword_entity`: a run of 2+ consecutive non-discourse Title-Case tokens, e.g. `Fourth Industrial Revolution`, `Goldman Sachs`). Digit and source-name checks were already there. Premise-*bound* OWNED is untouched ‚Äî it already runs the full `synthesis_contract.validate`.
- **HEADING (was report_ast.py:540, non-emptiness only):** `validate_heading` refuses a heading that carries a number (digit or spelled quantity/magnitude), names a source, or forecasts (`FORECAST`). A heading is now validated like any node instead of being a third voice that can assert anything. I took the "carry no assertion" route, not the "receipt" route, so `publisher.py:186` is left untouched and is now safe (a heading that reaches the page has already passed here).

### Design decisions worth flagging for Sol's re-review
- **Bare cardinals are deliberately permitted** in the premise-free lane (so `_MAGNITUDE_ABS`/`SPELLED_QTY` catch `doubled`/`fatal`/`half` but not `twelve`). This matches the existing, self-tested `synthesis_contract` policy (which lists `One‚Ä¶Ten` in `SAFE_CAPS` and only bans magnitude/ratio words), and it is what keeps the composer's true-by-construction self-count (`**Evidence base.** ‚Ä¶twelve verified passages drawn from five studies`) lawful without a special case. A bare-cardinal world-claim (`"‚Ä¶seven children"`) is the residual this leaves; closing it would require a document-statistic receipt (out of this rung's scope).
- **Named-entity detection is the 2+-consecutive-Title-Case proxy**, not full NER. It catches `Fourth Industrial Revolution` (forcing the abstract fix) without false-positiving a lone proper adjective (`English-language`), which a naive capital-letter check would wrongly kill. A *single* novel proper noun in a premise-free frame is the residual; the premise-bound lane already catches single entities against premise spans.

## THE SEVENTH BURN (root cause, one sentence)
